name: Unyeasted Carob Date Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve carob powder in some of the warm water.
2. Mix dry ingredients (flours, carob powder, salt) together.
3. Add chopped dates to the dry mixture.
4. Incorporate the dissolved carob and remaining water until a dough forms.
5. Knead the dough thoroughly on a floured surface (about 300 times).
6. Shape the dough into a loaf or loaves.
7. Slash the tops of the loaves.
8. Cover the tops with water or oil.
9. Place a damp towel over the loaves.
10. Allow to rise overnight.
11. Bake at 350°F for 1 3/4 hours (one large loaf or two small ones).
